name: Yokohama Kaidashi Kikou
original_name: ヨコハマ買い出し紀行
overview: In a peaceful post-apocalyptic world where the coasts have been flooded, the robot Alpha is left in charge of a Cafe by her owner who went off travelling. One day, she receives a package containing a camera, which causes Alpha to take a closer look at the little things in life.

trailers.title: Yokohama Kaidashi Kikou ~ Opening Sequence HQ
